Home | About | Types | Solutions | Contact

Welcome

Pollution Control Hub is an awareness website that provides information about pollution, its harmful effects, and simple ways to reduce it.

About Pollution

Pollution is the contamination of the environment by harmful substances. It affects human health, animals, plants, and nature.

Types of Pollution

  • Air Pollution
  • Water Pollution
  • Soil Pollution
  • Noise Pollution

How to Control Pollution

  1. Plant more trees.
  2. Reduce plastic usage.
  3. Use public transport.
  4. Recycle waste materials.
  5. Save electricity and water.
